corrections.correct: ἐξήνεγκεν τὰ ἅγια σκεύη τοῦ κυρίου
corrections.note: Missing word ἅγια ("holy") between τὰ and σκεύη; apparatus note '9 αγια] ιερα Α' confirms ἅγια is the body reading.
Missing letters ηρ; verb is ἀπηρείσατο (deposited), confirmed by apparatus 'απηρεισατο ... Α'.
3rd-person singular aorist (subject Κῦρος ὁ βασιλεύς), not 2nd-person; image shows -εν ending.
Missing iota and wrong accent placement; word is θυίσκαι (incense pans).
Alternate-verse marker should be parenthesized like other (N) markers on the page.
Codex A variant is Ἱεροσόλυμα (printed Ιερουσολυμα); transcription split the trailing α off and misread the stem; siglum is uppercase Α.
Word is κράτιστοι (most excellent), missing στ.

uncertain.note: Lemma in apparatus may read αρχιφιλοι (with iota) rather than αρχιφυλοι; small print, ambiguous.

uncertain.location: Apparatus v.9 μετηγαγεν] reading for Α
uncertain.note: Codex A variant printed as μετηγενεικεν is unusual; could be μετηνεγκεν or μετενηνοχεν, hard to read clearly.
